heading: Major science and technology proposals
label: 6618 Major science and technology proposals
text: The Director shall identify and provide an annual report to Congress on each major multinational science and technology project, in which the United States is not a participant, which has a total estimated cost greater than $1,000,000,000.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6618, , , , directed President to transmit annually to Congress a report on science and technology to be prepared by Office of Science and Technology Policy, and directed Director of Office to make the report available as a public document, prior to repeal by , , .
